label.purpose: Eyebrows, badges, kickers — Public Sans 700, uppercase, +0.08em.

mono.purpose: Pay rates, reference numbers, phone numbers — IBM Plex Mono.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Exponential ease-out for hover lifts and reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default call to action — 'Join us'. Pill, purple fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:700; line-height:1; height:2.75rem; padding:0 1.5rem; border-radius:999px; border:2px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; text-decoration:none; transition:background-color .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #005EB8; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-primary { background:#5E22A6; color:#fff; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#491A82; }

components.name: Highlight Button
components.description: The hero's lead CTA — spark green with ink text (verified contrast), large size.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:700; line-height:1; height:3.375rem; padding:0 2rem; font-size:1.125rem; border-radius:999px; border:2px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; transition:background-color .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #005EB8; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-highlight { background:#1FB866; color:#16121C; } .ds-btn-highlight:hover { background:#14AD5F; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with purple border and text; soft-purple fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:700; line-height:1; height:2.75rem; padding:0 1.5rem; border-radius:999px; border:2px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; text-decoration:none; transition:background-color .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),color .15s; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #005EB8; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-outline { background:transparent; color:#5E22A6; border-color:#5E22A6; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:#E7DBF7; color:#491A82; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small uppercase category label in a soft-tint pill. Default = purple.
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.4em; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.75rem; letter-spacing:.02em; text-transform:uppercase; line-height:1; padding:.42em .7em; border-radius:6px; background:#E7DBF7; color:#491A82; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: News/resource card — eyebrow, Archivo title, meta, body, link. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
News

Pay deal: where we stand

12 June 2026

The latest on the NHS pay award and what it means for London Ambulance Service staff.

Read more →
components.css: .ds-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; background:#fff; border:1px solid #EAE7EF; border-radius:14px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,18,28,.06),0 2px 4px rgba(22,18,28,.05); transition:box-shadow .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),border-color .2s; max-width:360px; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(22,18,28,.10),0 4px 10px rgba(22,18,28,.05); transform:translateY(-3px); border-color:#E2DFE8; } .ds-card-body { padding:1.25rem 1.25rem 1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.5rem; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:.875rem; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#00843D; } .ds-card-title { font-family:'Archivo','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:1.5rem; line-height:1.25; letter-spacing:-0.015em; color:#16121C; margin:0; } .ds-card-meta { font-family:'Public Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.875rem; color:#7A7287; } .ds-card-text { font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-size:1rem; line-height:1.55; color:#5C5468; margin:0; } .ds-card-link { font-family:'Public Sans',sans-serif; color:#5E22A6; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; } .ds-card-link:hover { color:#491A82; text-decoration:underline; }

components.name: Emergency Bar
components.description: Signature component. Drenched-red UNISON Direct help line — the one element allowed to own the red. Number set in Archivo black as a tel: link.
components.html: UNISON Direct — get help now0800 0857 857Mon–Fri 06:00–midnight · Sat 09:00–16:00
components.css: .ds-emerg { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; background:#D5281B; color:#fff; padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-radius:14px; } .ds-emerg-icon { flex:none; width:42px; height:42px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(255,255,255,.16); border-radius:999px; } .ds-emerg-icon svg { width:22px; height:22px; } .ds-emerg-text { display:flex; flex-direction:column; line-height:1.1; } .ds-emerg-kicker { font-weight:700; font-size:.875rem; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; opacity:.9; } .ds-emerg-number { font-family:'Archivo','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(1.75rem,1.4rem + 1.8vw,2.375rem); letter-spacing:-0.015em; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; } .ds-emerg-number:hover { text-decoration:underline; } .ds-emerg-hours { margin-left:auto; font-size:.875rem; opacity:.9; text-align:right; }

components.name: Stat
components.description: Signature component. A countable proof point — big Archivo-black figure over a small label.
components.css: .ds-stat { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.25rem; font-family:'Public Sans','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-stat-value { font-family:'Archivo','Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.015em; line-height:1; font-size:clamp(2.5rem,1.8rem + 3.6vw,3.75rem); color:#5E22A6; } .ds-stat-label { font-size:1rem; font-weight:600; color:#16121C; }

narrative.overview:
The site carries itself the way a trade-union branch carries its banner: proud, heritage-bound, and made to be seen at the front of a march. UNISON purple grounds everything; green and a brighter spark green are the rallying accents. Display type is Archivo at 800–900 — banner lettering, loud and unembarrassed — over the quiet, Helvetica-adjacent calm of Public Sans for everything you actually read. The feeling to land is solidarity made visible: almost 7,000 members standing together, a branch that represents, protects and stands up for the people who answer the call.

Underneath the banner there is an operational discipline borrowed from the service itself. Numbers that matter — pay rates, reference numbers, the help-line phone number — are set in IBM Plex Mono so they read as fact, not decoration. The 999-emergency register (a single hard red) is held in reserve and spent only on the genuinely urgent; its rarity is the whole point. Motion is restrained and quick; surfaces lift gently on soft, purple-tinted shadows. The result should read as institutional and trustworthy first, campaigning second — never the other way around.
keyCharacteristics: Heritage-led: UNISON purple + green do the identity work; everything else is functional.
Banner-bold display type (Archivo 800–900) against calm humanist body type (Public Sans).
Mono for facts: rates, references and phone numbers in IBM Plex Mono.
The red is earned — emergency register reserved for genuine urgency.
Accessibility-first: built for a tired reader, mid-shift, on a small bright screen (WCAG 2.2 AA floor).

rules.name: The Earned-Red Rule
rules.body: Emergency Red (#D5281B) is reserved for the genuinely urgent — the help line and true alerts. Never use it for general emphasis, decoration, or a 'look at this' accent. Its rarity is what gives it force.

rules.name: The Hi-Vis Rule
rules.body: Hi-Vis Yellow (#FFD200) appears only inside the battenburg motif. It is never a UI colour — not a button, not a highlight, not text.

rules.name: The One Heritage Rule
rules.body: Purple and green carry the identity. Blue, spark green, red and amber are functional — they mean something (clinical, highlight, emergency, warning). Never promote a functional colour to a decorative brand colour.

rules.name: The Banner Rule
rules.body: Headlines use Archivo 800–900 and never apologise. Letter-spacing on display sits at -0.02em — tight and confident, never looser, never tighter than letters touching.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Anything a member might quote back — a pay figure, a case reference, the UNISON Direct number — is set in IBM Plex Mono so it reads as fact.

rules.name: The One-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The uppercase label/eyebrow is a deliberate category marker (a news category, the hero's 'UK's biggest ambulance branch'). It is not scaffolding to drop above every section. Earn each one.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted with the ink-strong hue (rgba(22,18,28,…)), never plain rgba(0,0,0,…). If a shadow looks grey and dirty, it is wrong.

dos: Do lead with the heritage: UNISON Purple grounds the page, green and spark green rally it.
Do keep the emergency help line (UNISON Direct) reachable within seconds on every screen — help first, fast.
Do set rates, reference numbers and phone numbers in IBM Plex Mono so they read as fact.
Do use Spark Green text (#1FB866) and white on dark purple; on light surfaces keep body text at #2A2433 and muted no lighter than #5C5468 (verified ≥4.5:1).
Do keep the one global focus ring (3px NHS-blue, 2px offset) on every interactive element, and honour prefers-reduced-motion.
Do put Archivo 800–900 to work on headlines — confident, tight at -0.02em, balanced wrapping.
donts: Don't make it corporate / SaaS slick — no gradient-mesh heroes, no 'book a demo' gloss, no glassmorphism by default.
Don't make it a dated gov template — no grey-box GDS clone, no accordion soup, no hard grey drop-shadows.
Don't make it loud / agitprop — no all-caps body shouting, no clip-art megaphones, no ransom-note layouts. Conviction shows in clarity, not volume.
Don't spend the emergency red on anything but genuine urgency, and never use hi-vis yellow as a UI colour (battenburg motif only).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — emphasis comes from Archivo weight and size, a single solid colour.
Don't set the two sans-serifs (Archivo / Public Sans) at similar sizes side by side; separate them by role and weight.
Don't drop an uppercase eyebrow above every section — it's a deliberate category marker, not scaffolding.
